title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Devyani International

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Devyani International
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International:
Devyani International is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
